name: Lemon Asparagus & Carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and trim small carrots. Place in a steamer basket over boiling water. Cover and steam for about 15 minutes or until crisp-tender.
2. Remove carrots from the steamer, rinse under cold water, and drain well.
3. Cook frozen asparagus spears according to package instructions. Rinse under cold water and drain.
4. Combine chilled carrots and cooked asparagus. Drizzle with lemon juice and sprinkle with lemon pepper.
5. Serve immediately.
